positive.prompt: Audit the accessibility (a11y) of our web forms for WCAG compliance
Add ARIA labels and keyboard navigation to this modal popup
Check and fix color contrast compliance for screen readers

negative.prompt: Style a responsive flexbox layout using Tailwind
Design a dark mode color scheme for a dashboard

evals.prompt: Audit and fix a form page to support keyboard tab navigation and correct ARIA descriptors.
evals.expected_output: Tab indexing and ARIA descriptors are explicitly fixed for assistive technologies.
expectations: Form inputs are associated with descriptive label elements
Tab index and keyboard focus states are explicitly styled/handled
ARIA descriptors (e.g. aria-invalid, aria-describedby) are correctly applied
Verification steps confirm page screen reader and keyboard accessibility
